'''Andrel Lacmar''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] military officer during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
As the ranking [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] officer in the [[Brak sector/Legends|Brak sector]], [[General/Legends|General]] Lacmar reported to [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Lesan Ramier]] and worked together with [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Garrik Trier|Trier]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. Trier and Lacmar clashed heavily over battle tactics. Lacmar was relatively inexperienced when he was promoted to command rank and Trier preferred to use unconventional tactics, a combination that produced a series of ineffective battles.

{{Char-stub}}
